name: Schwälbchen Molkerei AG
message: Schwälbchen Molkerei AG is a company that operates in the Consumer Services industry. It is a German manufacturer and wholesaler of dairy products. It operates in two business segments: milk production and merchandise. The Company's range of products includes fresh milk, homogenized milk, cream and yogurt, butter, cheese manufactures as well as curd, among others. The company is headquartered in Bad Schwalbach, Hessen, Germany. Revenue: $211M Year 2022
